design_philosophy.core_loop: One-on-one fighting matches where players deplete opponent health bar through standard attacks, special moves, and ki blast mechanics
design_philosophy.primary_tension: Real-time execution of button combinations for special moves and desperation moves at low health; Rush Battle System counterattack timing when both fighters strike simultaneously
design_philosophy.player_fantasy: Play as iconic Dragon Ball Z characters across the Frieza saga through Majin Buu saga, executing signature special moves and meteor combos in competitive matches
design_philosophy.what_makes_it_opinionated: Unified health/Ki meter system where special move execution decreases health while Ki recharge increases it, creating strategic tension between offense and resource management. Removal of split-screen from predecessors; stage positioning becomes meaningful through knockback mechanics. Rush Battle System adds simultaneous-strike counterplay layer absent from typical Street Fighter II-style fighters

difficulty.player_agency_in_difficulty: Multiple game modes available (story mode in Japanese version, tournament mode with eight-player support, standard arcade modes); character roster selection provides tactical variety in matchups

progression.unlock_mechanism: Story mode progresses through character-specific narrative paths (Japanese version only); tournament mode uses bracket progression
replayability_hooks: Ten-character roster with distinct movesets and playstyles
Eight-player tournament mode for multiplayer competition
Character-specific story modes with narrative progression

world_building_techniques: Character selection draws from established Dragon Ball Z saga progression (Frieza through Majin Buu arcs)
Story mode provides character-specific narratives (Japanese version)
European version excludes story mode entirely, reducing narrative integration

faction_indicators: Kid Buu and Majin Buu represent antagonistic forces
danger_signals: Perfect Cell as ultimate bio-engineered threat
environmental_storytelling: Character roster selection reflects narrative progression through DBZ timeline
Tournament mode structure mirrors competitive martial arts tradition
